labels.72: Document classification codes or hierarchical identifier sequences (USDOC/ITA/OEENIS/NISD/CLUCYK format).
labels.2198: Positive sentiment phrases or emotionally uplifting text passages.
labels.4406: Forward slashes separating alphanumeric classification or document code components.
labels.6333: URL path separators and domain/path boundary characters (forward slashes, dots, underscores in URLs).
labels.7089: The feature activates on text boundaries where camelCase compound words or names are being split or joined mid-token.
labels.7720: Titles or descriptors (Mr., Mrs., Dr., Master, etc.) paired with personal names in obituaries and formal announcements.
labels.7978: Unclear - all activating windows contain only empty space between markers.
labels.11071: Pairs of names separated by "and" in bibliographic or reference list contexts.
labels.13133: Feature activates on item or product identifiers and catalog numbers embedded in text.
labels.15232: Numeric sequences or digit strings, often within dates, phone numbers, or identification codes.
labels.15776: Unclear - all windows show empty activations between markers with identical activation values.
labels.16356: URLs and domain names being split across token boundaries.
labels.17979: Phrases or words being split across morpheme or word boundaries during tokenization.
